title: Designing a Modern Web Application with React and Tailwind CSS
purpose: To create a responsive, visually appealing web application using React components and Tailwind CSS for styling, focusing on user experience and modern design principles.
module_context: This module focuses on building a complete web application using React and Tailwind CSS, emphasizing component-based architecture, responsive design, and modern UI/UX practices.

methods.name: Component-Based Architecture
methods.normalized_params: React components with props and state management

steps.content: Define reusable React components for UI elements like buttons, cards, and navigation bars
Implement state management using React hooks (useState, useEffect) for dynamic content
Create parent-child component relationships to manage data flow and UI interactions

methods.name: Responsive Design with Tailwind CSS
methods.normalized_params: Tailwind CSS utility classes for responsive layouts

steps.content: Use Tailwind's responsive prefixes (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:) to create adaptive layouts
Implement flexbox and grid layouts using Tailwind utility classes
Apply responsive spacing and typography using Tailwind's spacing scale and text utilities

methods.name: Modern UI/UX Principles
methods.normalized_params: Design principles including accessibility, consistency, and user feedback

steps.content: Ensure accessibility by using semantic HTML and ARIA attributes
Implement consistent design patterns and visual hierarchy
Provide user feedback through hover effects, transitions, and interactive elements
